description: The Mallardo clan is a Camorra crime clan based in Giugliano, Campania, Italy, founded in the late 1970s by Francesco Mallardo. It is a key member of the Secondigliano Alliance, considered the most powerful active Camorra group. The clan is involved in racketeering, smuggling, extortion, and drug trafficking, and has dominated the Neapolitan underworld since the 1990s. In 2011, Italian police seized assets worth €600 million from the clan.
